manual_pairing_required.title: {device_name} needs manual re-pairing

proxy_switch_detected.title: {device_name} connected via a different proxy
proxy_switch_detected.description:
The device at {address} was last successfully connected through proxy '{previous_proxy}', but this connection attempt is going through '{new_proxy}' instead.

If this device uses BLE bonding, the new proxy may not have the device's stored LTK (Long Term Key), or worse, attempting to pair via the new proxy may cause the device to invalidate its bond with the previous proxy.

To prevent this, open this integration's Reconfigure flow and pin this device to a specific proxy.

select_proxy.title: Select bonded proxy
select_proxy.description: Select the ESPHome proxy that holds the bond for {device_type} at {address}.

unpair_proxy.title: Clear existing bond
unpair_proxy.description:
Optionally clear the existing bond for {address} on proxy '{proxy}'. This is needed if the LTK is stale.

{unpair_error}

pair_proxy.title: Re-pair device
pair_proxy.description:
Trigger pairing for {address}. Choose the method your device uses.

{pair_error}

abort.no_options: No options available for this device type.

error.passkey_required: Enter the passkey shown on the device.

data.uds_auto_register: Auto-register new user if slot is empty
data.require_connectable: Only connect when device is connectable

error.user_index_out_of_range: User index must be between 0 and 255.
error.consent_code_out_of_range: Consent code must be between 0 and 65535.
error.cooldown_out_of_range: Cooldown must be between 1 and 1440 minutes.
